00000001010101100111110 - ASI: 14

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  10 = 1 * 0
  11 = 1 * 1
  000 = 0 * 00
  1010 = 10 * 10
  1100 = 11 * 00
  1110 = 11 * 10
  00000 = 00 * 000
  001010 = 00 * 1010
  101100 = 10 * 1100
  111110 = 11 * 1110
  00000001010 = 00000 * 001010
  101100111110 = 101100 * 111110
  00000001010101100111110 = 00000001010 * 101100111110
